name: @scaffscript/core
description: A minimal superset language of GML with TypeScript-like module system

scripts.build:node: bun build src/index-node.ts --outfile dist/index.cjs --target node --format cjs
scripts.build:bun: bun build src/index-bun.ts --outfile build/index.mjs --target bun --format esm
scripts.build:all: bun run build:node && bun run build:bun
